form.formComment: Racing second-up. First race start finished ninth of 11 runners at Larkhill on December 14 over 3200m, 31 len behind Henriettaredheart with 72kg. Returned from break finished eighth of 12 runners at Ludlow on March 19 over 3200m, 19 len behind Borna Gem with 70kg at $41. Happy to risk this time.

form.formComment: Having third race start. At big odds at debut, finished sixth of 8 runners at Warwick on February 20 over 3200m, slow track; 40 len behind Burds Of A Feather carrying 71kg at $5. Second-up finished fifth of 10 starters at Hereford on March 25 over 3900m, 24 len behind Isabella Islay with 71.5kg at $29. Can win without surprising.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming tracked on the speed and boxed on steadily finished fourth of 10 runners at Wincanton on February 14 over 3000m, on heavy track; 8 len behind Caballero Cliff carrying 66.5kg at $126. Last start pulled up at Wincanton on March 5 over 3000m. Hard to have. Doesn?t make much appeal.

form.formComment: Had two starts to date. At very big odds at debut, finished ninth of 11 runners at Exeter on January 9 over 3300m, 48 len behind Mortal Coil carrying 67.5kg at $81. Last start finished 12th of 13 starters at Wincanton on March 5 over 3000m, 58 len behind Indannya carrying 70kg at $251. This looks a stern test.

form.formComment: Racing second-up. First race start didn't finish the race at Tattersalls P2p on April 21 2024 over 4828m. Went for a break before returning finished sixth of 10 starters at Chepstow on March 15 over 3900m, slow track; 48 len behind Fern Gully carrying 72kg at $19. Definite chance. Cannot be ruled out.

form.formComment: Second-up today. Freshened for 40 days. Fresh up after three months finished eighth of 13 runners at Wincanton on March 5 over 3000m, 28 len behind Indannya carrying 70kg at $9.50. Previously second-up finished eighth of 14 runners at Huntingdon in the LR on December 7 over 3200m, on slow going 10 len behind Ti'mamzel carrying 71kg at $21. Can improve on first up performance. Plenty to like about her prospects this time.

form.formComment: Recent form impressive for this race. Freshened for 34 days. Last start finished third of 8 starters at Huntingdon on March 11 over 3900m, 4.5 len behind No No Fizz carrying 75.5kg at $15. Run before finished third in a small field at Sedgefield on January 25 over 3990m, 23 len behind Rosie Baloo carrying 71kg at $6. Racing well. Ready to bounce back to winning form.

form.formComment: Returns from the paddock today. Finished off last preparation 10 of 16 runners at Kempton Park February 2 over 3200m, 21 len behind Lady Magic with 71.5kg at $3.30. Previously first up; 2 of 7 runners at Leicester December 10 over 3100m, on rain affected going; 12 len behind The Cistercian with 68.5kg at $8.50. Could prove tough to stop.
